mapper.sql: ROrderNo, CustomerNo, UserNo, EndUser, ROrdDate, DlvEntire, DlvSite, TransFee, TransChannel, PrjCode, Employee, EmployeeNo, DlvType1, DlvType2, DlvType3, PackType, Customer_HK, CQueryNo, COrderNo, OptTime, Operator, ContractNo, DeptNo

select
distinct
,
from dbo._rcvmaseter_gz
order by ${orderByClause}

distinct
from dbo._rcvmaseter_gz
order by ${orderByClause}

update dbo._rcvmaseter_gz
ROrderNo = #{record.rorderno,jdbcType=CHAR},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UserNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EndUser = #{record.enduser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

Operator = #{record.operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ContractNo = #{record.contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=CHAR},
RV = #{record.rv,jdbcType=BINARY},
